title: scleria ciliata var. ciliata
intro: Scleria ciliata var. ciliata is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. Consuming the plant or using its herbal preparations is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal medicine, Scleria ciliata var. ciliata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in various pharmaceutical and cosmetic applications.
